name: AHOKU Electronic Company
summary: AHOKU Electronic Company provides smart home solutions. The company offers travel adapters and converters, USB chargers, power sockets, cabinet power strips, outlets surge protectors, wireless IP cameras, wireless chargers, Wi-Fi travel routers, car inverters, AC plugs, battery backups, alarm sensors, passive infrared sensors, smart sockets, moisture sensors, and night vision cameras, as well as wireless security cameras, door and window sensors, and Bluetooth smart sockets. AHOKU Electronic Company was founded in 1983 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
